name: boost_status
description: Reblog (boost) a status to share it with your followers. The boosted status will appear on your profile and in the home timelines of your followers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the status to boost.

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Visibility of the boost. One of: public, unlisted, private.

reblog.content: Just deployed a new feature! Check it out.
